member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Integration.NewtonsoftJson.Converters.HtmlEncodeStringPropertiesConverter
member.summary: A custom to ensure string values are properly encoded and decoded to mitigate XSS attacks.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Integration.NewtonsoftJson.Converters.HtmlEncodeStringPropertiesConverter.CanConvert(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether this instance can convert the specified object type.
member.returns: true if this instance can convert the specified object type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Integration.NewtonsoftJson.Converters.HtmlEncodeStringPropertiesConverter.ReadJson(Newtonsoft.Json.JsonReader,System.Type,System.Object,Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializer)
member.summary: Reads the JSON representation of the object.
member.param: The existing value of object being read.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Integration.NewtonsoftJson.Converters.HtmlEncodeStringPropertiesConverter.WriteJson(Newtonsoft.Json.JsonWriter,System.Object,Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializer)
member.summary: Writes the JSON representation of the object.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Integration.NewtonsoftJson.UmbrellaJsonIntegration
member.summary: Provides functionality to integrate the Newtonsoft.Json library with the Umbrella packages.
